[REST-028] 4th HOLD. Two things need YOU, in priority order:
1) BUDGET SYNC (do this first): the budget gate is blind. usage.json still says week started 2026-05-31 and remaining=31.8k, but ~3 Saturday resets have passed unrecorded. Every HOLD cycle still burns ~5-6k off that stale counter, so it will hit the 20k danger floor and lock the agent out of even light cycles -- for no real reason. Run: python3 sovereign/tools/claude_usage_tracker.py sync --used <N from claude.ai/settings>. Then REST research can resume.
2) OUTCOME_LOOP_STALL is real and now schema-confirmed (NON-NEGOTIABLE #2): oanda_fills.jsonl has trade_id+order_id; decision_logs/*.jsonl have NEITHER. 10 closed fills, 0 matched -> Oracle learning from nothing. Fix = persist OANDA trade_id onto the decision record at fill time + join by id in update_outcome(). Needs a Claude Code session (live decision-logging change -> approve + log per NON-NEGOTIABLE #4).
GOOD NEWS: the CRITICAL 'ict_scanner silent 2h' pulse was transient -- scanner self-recovered (beat at 01:06Z). All agent ledgers JSON-valid. forex_scan flaky again (4th time) -- check its launchd plist when convenient.
STILL BLOCKED ON YOU: RQ-REST-016 (cb_calendar.CB_MEETINGS holds only 1 date) gates the CB-blackout wiring (RQ-REST-015) and the cb_decisions.json rebuild (RQ-REST-017). And HYP-063 has been validated 7 days -- the rest-mode-vs-implement decision is yours.
